comment.body: It was a negative speed profile , which completely dictated liquidity is to the downside around 6750 area. Spot spent a lot of time around that level today. I think we spend too much time around thinking about gamma , and charm is the other side of gamma that we should take into consideration. If traders are selling gamma, market makers are hedging in the same direction but as the time ticks they have to unwind those hedges
